compatibilityProfile.label: Independent simulator policy; trial parity unverified
compatibilityProfile.name: public-docs-subset

bookableresourcebookings.simulatorPolicy: Bookings use UTC half-open intervals [start,end); equivalent offsets normalize before overlap checks.

connections.simulatorPolicy: Each logical relationship is represented by an exact reciprocal pair committed atomically.

incidentresolutions.simulatorPolicy: Created atomically by CloseIncident; direct writes are rejected.

incidents.simulatorPolicy: Resolve through CloseIncident; legacy direct PATCH remains accepted for schema-v2 compatibility.

invoices.simulatorPolicy: Paid and canceled invoices are read-only; payment processing is not simulated.

msdyn_workorders.simulatorPolicy: System status transitions are action-driven. Time advancement never changes work orders.

opportunitycloses.simulatorPolicy: Created atomically by WinOpportunity or LoseOpportunity; direct writes are rejected.

opportunityproducts.simulatorPolicy: Line arithmetic and parent rollups use exact fixed-point decimal math.

quotes.simulatorPolicy: Quote revisions are cloned snapshots; activated and closed quote headers and lines are read-only.

salesorders.simulatorPolicy: Converted orders snapshot quote pricing; submitted and terminal records are read-only.

simulatorPolicies: Public-documentation compatibility subset; exact tenant metadata and privileges require later trial verification.
Money is represented as canonical decimal strings and rounded half away from zero to each field scale.
No SLA KPI, inventory, payment processing, schedule board, BPF, competitor, territory, warehouse, or GPS behavior is claimed.
Closed sales records and terminal field service records are read-only except through explicit reopen actions.
